title: commelina communis f. minor
intro: Commelina communis f. minor, also known as lesser dayflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Commelinaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of lesser dayflower include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. Lesser dayflower can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
